## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI/visual change
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `node build.mjs --minify` succeeds with no errors
- [ ] `ha-fsolar.js` updated in repo root (committed)
- [ ] Screenshots or recording added if UI changed
- [ ] `hacs.json` unchanged (must contain only `name`)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
